title: Material
description: Physical material that a weapon or armor piece is made from. Contributes DR bonuses (armor) and momentum bonuses (weapons) on top of the item's base stats.

category.description: Broad category used by crafting and trade logic.

dr_bonus.description: Flat DR added to armor made of this material, on top of the item's base damage_reduction values.

weapon_momentum_bonus.description: Flat momentum added to weapons made of this material.

edge_retention.description: Multiplier on slash/pierce effectiveness per quality step. Steel holds an edge better than iron.
